Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved java.io.* import above java.net.* import

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant assignments to place the value on the same line as the declaration.
Reformatted constant assignments to place the value on the same line as the declaration.
Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Reformatted System.out.println call to keep the string concatenation on a single line.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and structure.
Removed unnecessary trailing newline at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed empty line after closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for newer JDK/Spring Boot versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log statement to prevent log injection vulnerabilities or formatting issues.
Update active profiles retrieval to fallback to default profiles if active profiles array is empty.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to specific profiles to prevent conflicts during testing.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Java 17.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the updated dependency stack.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule and org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Liquibase setter method with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated library versions.
Refactor SecurityConfiguration from extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to using @Configuration with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ deprecations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' and '@Override configure(HttpSecurity)' methods; added '@Configuration' and '@Bean SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http)' returning http.build().

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced '@EnableGlobalMethodSecurity(prePostEnabled = true, securedEnabled = true)' with '@EnableMethodSecurity(securedEnabled = true)'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from authorizeRequests().antMatchers() to authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() to use the new request matcher API in Spring Security 5.7+.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicit token request handler required by newer Spring Security versions.
Migrate header configuration (CSP, Referrer, Permissions) to use the new lambda DSL and updated method names (e.g., permissionsPolicy instead of featurePolicy).
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport entry point with standard HttpStatusEntryPoint and use the new exceptionHandling lambda DSL.
Migrate form login configuration to use the new lambda DSL and replace custom Ajax handlers with standard HTTP status responses.
Migrate logout configuration to use the new lambda DSL and replace custom Ajax logout handler with HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
Migrate remember-me configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
Remove the deprecated configure(WebSecurity) method for ignoring static resources, as this is now handled via SecurityFilterChain or ignored by default in newer setups.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted the 'configure(WebSecurity web)' method and its associated imports.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add SpaWebFilter to handle SPA-specific security requirements, replacing or supplementing previous CORS/CSRF filter logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added '.addFilterAfter(new SpaWebFilter(), BasicAuthenticationFilter.class)' and imported SpaWebFilter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add CookieCsrfFilter to handle CSRF token injection for SPAs, replacing the previous manual CorsFilter/CSRF setup.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added '.addFilterAfter(new CookieCsrfFilter(), BasicAuthenticationFilter.class)' and imported CookieCsrfFilter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler beans in favor of standard HTTP status responses.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted @Bean methods for ajaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, ajaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and ajaxLogoutSuccessHandler.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on SecurityProblemSupport for security exception handling, simplifying the configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of SecurityProblemSupport, removed field 'problemSupport', and removed its usage in exception handling.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove explicit CorsFilter injection and configuration from SecurityConfiguration, likely moving CORS config to a separate filter or relying on default behavior.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed 'CorsFilter corsFilter' field, constructor argument, and '.addFilterBefore(corsFilter, CsrfFilter.class)'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update authorization rules to permit access to static assets and API docs, and restrict websocket access to authenticated users.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added requestMatchers for static files (js, css, etc.) and /swagger-ui/** to permitAll; changed /websocket/** from permitAll to authenticated.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Consolidate static resource locations by adding a parent directory to cover all subdirectories.
Update resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader matching instead of specific directory prefixes.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3.x endpoints instead of 2.x.
Clean up imports that are no longer used after the code changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException; import java.util.*; import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
